name: Redcurrant and Spiced Lime Schiacciata
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour into a large bowl and rub in the butter. Stir in the sugar, cinnamon, and yeast. Gradually add the water until a soft dough forms. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface and knead for 5 minutes until smooth and elastic. Place in a clean bowl, cover with oiled plastic wrap, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour until doubled in size.
2. Preheat the oven to 230C/450F/Gas 8. Knock back the dough and knead again for 2-3 minutes until smooth. Roll out to an oval about 30x20 cm and place on a lightly oiled baking sheet.
3. To make the frangipane, mix together the ground almonds, lime rind and juice, cream, vanilla essence, beaten eggs, and sugar in a bowl. Spread over the dough, sprinkle with redcurrants, and dust heavily with icing sugar. Bake for 30 minutes until golden brown.
4. To freeze: wrap tightly in foil and store in the freezer for up to 2 months.
